commit_scope: Primitive registry: every kernel native carries (name, category, spec, verification recipe, expected outside, lane) in the kernel-satsang ksat-part discipline; one generic band proves the lane-1 surface three-way; a drift gate and wellness sense keep registry == kernel source and the carrier tail visible.

results.primitive_registry_band: verdict 63 three-way (go/rust/ts byte-identical output incl. print + trace probes), 0 divergent
results.registry_surface: 197 entries == 197 main.go natives (registerNative + fieldConstructors table + registerEnvNative); 162 lane-1 in-band verified; 35 lane-0 carrier-declared
results.drift_gate: rc 0 — names, category tokens, lane/sibling-presence, band pins all aligned
results.full_validate: see PR description for the no-arg ./validate.sh aggregate on this branch

measured_claims: Band coverage before this change: 117 of 197 native names appeared in any stdlib test band; 80 carried no declared behavioral verification.

After: all 197 carry declared (spec, verification recipe, expected outside); 162 verifications execute three-way every validate run; the 35-entry tail is named per-entry with its carrier reason (panic-contract 2, socket-carrier 7, sweep-hazard 1, toolchain 1, sibling-gap 24).

Sibling gaps made legible: 17 go-only natives (compile_* family, framebuffer-observe trio, math_acos, pair_angle, dominant_band_delta, print_float, str_line_at, str_ascii_prefix), 2 rust-gaps (framebuffer-counts, framebuffer-event-rows), 4 ts-gaps (value_str, value_kind, value-kind, str_to_float) + jit_compiled?.

first_catches.ts_node_eq_attribution: form-kernel-ts registered node_eq as catWitness while go and rust declare catCompare(eq) — caught by the band's native_blueprint exemplar attestation (ts attested 161/162), healed in kernel.ts in the same breath
first_catches.go_write_form_binary_duplicate: main.go registered write_form_binary twice (second silently overwrote the first); duplicate composted, and the drift gate now fails on any duplicate registration
first_catches.int32_literal_space: trivial int literals parse into 32-bit inst space (4294967295 reads back as -1) while natives return honest int64 — u32 bit-op verifications rewritten as round-trip reductions, the teaching now lives in those entries' spec lines

downstream.fourth_kernel: M2 verification-source and M4 question-list now cite primitive-registry.fk — an emitted kernel proves itself primitive-by-primitive against the declared verification recipes
downstream.wellness: sense_form_primitives surfaces lane totals, sibling gaps, and band circulation every wellness run
